code:
from django.core.paginator import Paginator

items = [1, 2, 3]
p = Paginator(items, 2)
print(p.page(5).object_list)

print(format(value, 'y'))

code:
from sphinx.ext.autodoc.mock import _MockObject
from typing import TypeVar

T = TypeVar('T')
obj = _MockObject()
print(obj + T)
error: TypeError: can only concatenate str to str, not TypeVar

plt.bar(x, y)

code:
import xarray as xr

a = xr.DataArray([1, 2, 3], attrs={'unit': 'm'})
b = xr.where(a > 1, a, 0)
print(b.attrs)
error: Attributes unexpectedly lost after xr.where operation

code:
from sklearn.feature_selection import SequentialFeatureSelector
from sklearn.linear_model import LinearRegression
from sklearn.model_selection import KFold
import numpy as np

X = np.random.randn(20, 5)
y = np.random.randn(20)
cv = KFold(n_splits=5).split(X)
sfs = SequentialFeatureSelector(LinearRegression(), cv=cv)
sfs.fit(X, y)
error: SequentialFeatureSelector fails when passing iterable splits

code:
from astropy.nddata import NDDataRef
import numpy as np

a = NDDataRef(np.array([1, 2, 3]), mask=np.array([True, False, False]))
b = NDDataRef(np.array([4, 5, 6]))
c = a.add(b)
print(c.mask)
error: Mask propagation incorrect when one operand has no mask
